name: Feature request

## Workflow

What agent workflow would this improve?

## Output type

What kind of output would Context Relay summarize or retrieve?

## Safety boundary

What should never be summarized for this workflow?

## Retrieval contract

When should an agent retrieve the raw artifact before acting?
